## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Editorial (typo, broken link, formatting; no semantic effect)
- [ ] Clarification (improves precision without changing meaning)
- [ ] Substantive change (requires an RFC issue per GOVERNANCE.md)
- [ ] Profile or appendix change

## Related issues

<!-- Reference any related issues by number. Substantive changes MUST reference an RFC issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have signed off my commits (`git commit -s`) per the DCO
- [ ] If this is a substantive change, an RFC issue exists and the comment period has elapsed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if normative content changed
- [ ] No marketing language or vendor promotion added
